response.original_title: ((Add a Passenger)) How to Successfully Add Additional Passengers to an Already Booked Seabourn Cruise?
response.overview: To add a passenger to your Seabourn Cruise, you must contact Seabourn Customer Relations directly ☏ +1-855-732-4023 [US] or reach out to your travel agent, as this cannot be done online. Addition requests are subject to ship capacity, maximum suite occupancy, and may trigger a re-pricing of the booking at current rates. Direct Booking: Call Seabourn Reservations in North America at ☏ +1-855-732-4023 (available Monday–Friday, 6:00 AM to 5:00 PM, Saturday 6:00 AM to 3:30 PM, and Sunday 7:00 AM to 3:30 PM PST). To add a passenger to an existing Seabourn Cruise, you must contact Seabourn Customer Service directly at ☏ +1-855-732-4023 [US] or reach out to your travel agent. This process cannot be done online through the Seabourn website or app because it requires manual verification of ship capacity and lifeboat limits. Contact Support: Call Seabourn Cruises directly at ☏ +1-855-732-4023 [US] you used to book the trip.
response.title: ((Add a Passenger)) How to Successfully Add Additional Passengers to an Already Booked Seabourn Cruise?
